plugins.name: claude-for-msft-365-install
plugins.description: Provision direct cloud access (Vertex AI, Bedrock, or LLM gateway) for the Claude Microsoft 365 add-in. Generates the customized manifest, walks through Azure admin consent, and writes per-user config via Graph extension attributes.
